item.title: Trener Robotics raises $32M for robot-agnostic skills platform
item.description: Trener Robotics’ Acteris is a robot-agnostic skills platform that lets operators describe the tasks they want to automate in their own words. The post...

item.title: PickNik Robotics to work with Motiv Space Systems on NASA ISAM mission
item.description: For the mission, Motiv will be developing the robotic system while PickNik will provide robot motion planning and arm control software. The post PickN...

item.title: Warehousing robot maker turns to lubrication-free motion plastics
item.description: Bastian Solutions needed rugged and reliable bearings for its warehousing robot to load trucks, so it turned to igus motion plastics. The post Warehou...

item.title: Apptronik brings in another $520M to ramp up Apollo production
item.description: Apptronik has raised a total of close to $1 billion as it continues developing the Apollo humanoid robot for industrial applications and more. The pos...

item.title: Symbotic acquires autonomous forklift maker Fox Robotics
item.description: Most of Fox Robotics' customers are not Symbotic customers, but it appears the two companies share one large customer. The post Symbotic acquires auto...
